message.content:
@startuml
title US007 - As Director, I want to associate a human resource (user) to a project

actor "Authenticated User" as user1
participant ":System" as system1

activate user1
user1 ->> system1 : 1 Asks to associate a human resource (user) to a project\nSearch for the Data
deactivate system1
system1 --> user1 
note right of this line #line:red;line:green;text:black;font size=8;backColor:#DDFFBB;\n2 Search for the data\ntext-align:center
end note


activate user1
user1 ->> system1 :3 Asks for Project List \nShows Project list
deactivate system1
system1 --> user1 

activate user1
user1 ->> system1 :5 Asks for System User List \n Shows System User List
deactivate system1
system1 --> user1 


activate user1
user1 ->> system1 :7 Types data(email ,projectCode,startdate,endDate,costPerHour,\npercentageOfAllocation)\nShow Information Success
deactivate system1
system1 --> user1 



@enduml
